Re-ingesting the same content produces identical facts, avoiding near-duplicate writes to the facts table."]}]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Usage"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\nmid = mem.remember(\n  \"Mnemosyne uses raises.\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"OpenAI-compatible
